text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].
tl: Qul oohiya ilaiya annna hustama'a nafarum minal jinni faqaalooo innaa sami'naa quraanan ajaba

text: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.
tl: Yahdeee ilar rushdi fa-aamannaa bihee Wa-lan nushrika bi-rabbinaaa 'ahada

text: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son
tl: Wa-annahoo Ta'aalaa jaddu Rabbinaa maat takhaza saahibatanw Wa-laa walada

text: And that our foolish one [i.e., Iblees] has been saying about Allāh an excessive transgression.
tl: Wa-annahoo kaana yaqoolu safeehunaa 'al allahi shatata

text: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allāh a lie.
tl: Wa-annaa zanannaaa al lan taqoolal insu wal-jinnu 'al allahi kaziba

text: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden [i.e., sin].
tl: Wa-annahoo kaana rijaalun minal insi ya'oozoona bi-rijaalin minal jinni fa-zaadoohum rahaqa

text: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allāh would never send anyone [as a messenger].
tl: Wa-annahum zannoo kamaa zanantum al lany yab'asal laahu 'ahada

text: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.
tl: Wa-annaa lamasnas samaaa'a fa-wajadnaahaa muli'at harasan shadeedanw Wa-shuhuba

text: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.
tl: Wa-annaa kunnaa naq'udu minhaa maqaa'ida lis'sam'i famany yastami'il 'aana yajid lahoo shihaabar rasada

text: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.
tl: Wa-annaa laa nadreee asharrun ureeda biman fil ardi 'am 'araada bihim rabbuhum rashada

text: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.
tl: Wa-annaa minnas saalihoona Wa-minnaa doona zaalika kunnaa taraaa'iqa qidada

text: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.
tl: Wa-annaa zanan-naaa al lan nu'jizal laaha fil ardi Wa-lan nu'jizahoo haraba

text: And when we heard the guidance [i.e., the Qur’ān], we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.
tl: Wa-annaa lammaa sami'nal hudaaa aamannaa bihee famany yu'min bi-rabbihee falaa yakhaafu bakhsanw Wa-laa rahaqa

text: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allāh], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.
tl: Wa-annaa minnal muslimoona Wa-minnal qaasitoona faman aslama fa-ulaaa'ika taharraw rashada

text: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.'
tl: Wa-ammal qaasitoona fa-kaanoo li-jahannama hataba

text: And [Allāh revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant rain [i.e., provision]
tl: Wa-alla-wis taqaamoo 'alat tareeqati la-asqaynaahum maa'an ghadaqa

text: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.
tl: Linaftinahum feeh; Wa-many yu'rid 'an zikri rabbihee yasluk-hu 'azaaban sa'ada

text: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allāh, so do not invoke with Allāh anyone.
tl: Wa-annal masaajida lil-laahi falaa tad'oo ma'al laahi 'ahada

text: And that when the Servant [i.e., Prophet] of Allāh stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass.\"
tl: Wa-annahoo lammaa qaama 'abdul laahi yad'oohu kaadoo yakoonoona 'alaihi libada

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone.\"
tl: Qul innamaaa ad'oo rabbee Wa-laaa ushriku biheee 'ahada

text: Say, \"Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction.\"
tl: Qul innee laaa amliku lakum darranw Wa-laa rashada

text: Say, \"Indeed, there will never protect me from Allāh anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.
tl: Qul innee lany yujeeranee minal laahi 'ahadunw, Wa-lan ajida min doonihee multahada

text: But [I have for you] only notification from Allāh, and His messages.\" And whoever disobeys Allāh and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.
tl: Illaa balaagham minal laahi Wa-risaalaatih; Wa-many ya'sil laaha Wa-rasoolahoo fa-inna lahoo naara jahannama khaalideena feehaaa 'abada

text: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.
tl: Hattaaa izaa ra-aw maa yoo'adoona fasaya'lamoona man ad'afu naasiranw Wa-aqallu 'adada

text: Say, \"I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period.\"
tl: Qul in adreee a-qareebum maa too'adoona am yaj'alu lahoo rabbeee 'amada

text: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone
tl: Aalimul ghaibi falaa yuzhiru alaa ghaibiheee 'ahada

text: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before him [i.e., each messenger] and behind him observers
tl: Illaa manir tadaa mir rasoolin fa-innahoo yasluku min baini yadaihi Wa-min khalfihee rasada

text: That he [i.e., Muḥammad (ﷺ)] may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
tl: Liya'lama an qad ablaghoo risaalaati rabbihim Wa-ahaata bi-maa ladaihim Wa-ahsaa kulla shai'in 'adada
